mapper.insert:
insert into desk_info(id, desk_name, desk_no, floor_no, desk_type, desk_x, desk_y) values
(#{desk.id},#{desk.desk_name},#{desk.desk_no},#{desk.floor_no},#{desk.desk_type},#{desk.desk_x},#{desk.desk_y})

insert into seat_info(id, seat_name, seat_no, floor_no, seat_x, seat_y) values
(#{seat.id},#{seat.seat_name},#{seat.seat_no},#{seat.floor_no},#{seat.seat_x},#{seat.seat_y})
